backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a tic-tac-toe game backend with helpers for win/tie detection, symbol counting, and a `updateGameState` function that returns game features including points and field state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (Share tab title update in TimerVisibilityBar settings dialog) to its relevant source file and test ID with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing styling changes, hook responsibilities, and component behaviors across the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, loading the Quicksand font from Google Fonts and mounting the app at `#root` via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all major features including timers, backgrounds, music, tasks, reminders, and routing, with an error boundary and a stable media layer to prevent unnecessary unmounts.
frontend/src/branding.ts: Single-export module providing the `APP_NAME` constant ('TickTockTask') as the app's branding source of truth.
frontend/src/features/alerts/alertSounds: Defines available alert sound options and provides a `playAlertSound` utility that plays built-in tones (beep, chime, bell, ping) via the Web Audio API or custom/YouTube sounds via URL.
frontend/src/features/alerts/TimerAlertS: Settings UI component for configuring timer alerts, including an enable/disable toggle, a completion sound selector with custom sound support, and a preview button.
frontend/src/features/alerts/TimerAlerts: React context provider managing timer alert state (enabled flag, selected sound) with localStorage persistence, sound preview, and a `notifyCompletion` function that shows a toast and plays the selected sound.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/Backgr: React component that renders a UI for setting the app background via file upload, direct URL, or YouTube URL, with controls for volume, brightness, and timer overlay toggle.
Fixed-position button component that toggles browser fullscreen mode, visible only when an active background is set, with Safari fallback support.
Fixed-position play/pause button rendered only when a video or YouTube background is active and not in fullscreen, delegating playback toggling to the background context.
React context provider that wraps the `useBackground` hook and exposes background state and actions to child components, while also managing blob URL cleanup on background changes.
Renders the active background (image, video, or YouTube player) as a full-screen stage, handling play/pause control, error states, and spacebar keyboard shortcut for video playback.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/loadYo: Loads the YouTube IFrame Player API script once and returns a shared promise that resolves when the API is ready. Also declares global TypeScript types for the YT player interface.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/mediaS: Provides utility functions for inferring media type from MIME types or URLs, validating URLs, generating error messages, and probing whether a URL loads as an image or video.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/useBac: Custom React hook that manages background state (image, video, or YouTube) with localStorage persistence, boot-time validation of persisted backgrounds, and controls for brightness, volume, and playback.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/YouTub: Memoized component that initializes and manages a YouTube IFrame player sized to cover the viewport, supporting play/pause control, volume adjustment, looping, and error reporting.
frontend/src/features/backgrounds/youtub: Parses various YouTube URL formats to extract a video ID, and builds an optimized YouTube embed URL with autoplay and loop parameters for background playback.
frontend/src/features/music/MusicProvide: React context provider that exposes the useMusic hook's state and actions (source URL, type, volume, controls) to child components via useMusicContext.
frontend/src/features/music/MusicSetting: Settings UI component for entering a music URL (Spotify, Apple Music, or direct audio), displaying active music status, and adjusting playback volume via a slider.
frontend/src/features/music/MusicStage.t: Renders the appropriate hidden playback element based on music source type: a native audio element for direct audio, or off-screen iframes for Spotify and Apple Music embeds.
frontend/src/features/music/musicSupport: Parses music URLs to classify them as Spotify, Apple Music, direct audio, or unknown, and converts share links into embeddable URLs for each supported service.
frontend/src/features/music/useMusic.ts: Custom React hook that manages music playback state (source URL, type, embed URL, volume) with localStorage persistence and an audio element ref for direct audio control.
frontend/src/features/navigation/Navigat: Settings UI component that displays instructions for drag-to-reorder navigation tabs and provides a button to reset the tab order to its default.
frontend/src/features/navigation/navigat: Defines the NavigationTabId type, tab definitions, default order array, and a helper to look up a tab's label by ID.
frontend/src/features/navigation/Reorder: Navigation tab bar component that supports pointer-based drag-and-drop reordering via a grip handle, updating the tab order on drop.
frontend/src/features/navigation/useNavi: Custom hook that loads, persists, and normalizes the navigation tab order from localStorage, with a reset function to restore the default order.
frontend/src/features/publishShare/Publi: Sheet component that displays the current URL for sharing, with copy-to-clipboard and open-in-new-tab actions, and a warning when running inside an embedded preview iframe.
frontend/src/features/publishShare/useIs: Hook that detects whether the app is running inside an iframe by comparing window.self to window.top, returning true if embedded.
frontend/src/features/reminders/Reminder: Headless component that polls reminders every 10 seconds and triggers a notification via the alerts system when a reminder's due date has passed.
UI component for managing reminders, providing dialogs to add and edit reminders and a sorted list with delete and edit actions.
frontend/src/features/reminders/useRemin: Custom hook that manages a list of reminders in localStorage, exposing add, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/features/sounds/CustomSound: React context provider that manages custom sounds state, including adding sounds via URL or file upload, volume control, preview playback, and reordering, with persistence to localStorage.
frontend/src/features/sounds/customSound: Utility module for loading, saving, and validating custom sounds in localStorage, with helpers for ID generation, file-to-data-URL conversion, and audio file validation.
frontend/src/features/sounds/SoundCustom: UI panel component for managing custom sounds, offering controls to add (via URL or file upload), edit, delete, reorder (drag-and-drop or buttons), preview sounds, and adjust volume.
frontend/src/features/sounds/useSoundPan: Custom hook that persists and toggles the sound panel's visibility state in localStorage.
frontend/src/features/sounds/youtubeSoun: Module that plays audio from YouTube URLs using the IFrame API via a hidden player, with auto-stop after a configurable duration and cleanup utilities.
frontend/src/features/tasks/TasksPanel.t: UI panel component for a task list supporting bulleted, numbered, and to-do modes, with controls to add, toggle, delete, and clear tasks.
frontend/src/features/tasks/useTasks.ts: Custom hook managing task list state (items and list mode) with add, toggle, delete, and clear operations, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/features/tasks/useTasksPane: Custom hook that persists and toggles the tasks panel's visibility state in localStorage.
frontend/src/features/timers/countdown/C: React component rendering a countdown timer card with a time display, play/pause/reset controls, and editable hour/minute/second duration inputs. Triggers an alert notification via TimerAlertsProvider on completion.
frontend/src/features/timers/countdown/u: Custom hook managing countdown timer state including duration (persisted to localStorage), start/pause/reset actions, and accurate tick logic via useAccurateInterval. Fires an optional onComplete callback when the timer reaches zero.
frontend/src/features/timers/interval/In: React component rendering an interval timer card showing current interval (Work/Rest), round progress, play/pause/reset/skip controls, and editable settings for interval durations and round count. Notifies on full cycle completion.
frontend/src/features/timers/interval/us: Custom hook managing interval timer state with alternating A/B intervals across configurable rounds, persisting settings to localStorage. Handles start/pause/reset/skip logic and fires optional callbacks on interval or full cycle completion.
frontend/src/features/timers/navigation/: React component rendering draggable timer mode tabs using pointer events, supporting reordering via drag-and-drop with animated tab shifting. Distinguishes clicks from drags using a movement threshold.
Defines the list of available timer modes with their IDs and labels, exports the default tab order array, and provides a helper to look up a mode's display label by ID.
Small settings UI component that displays instructions for reordering timer tabs and provides a button to reset the tab order to its default.
Custom hook that loads, normalizes, persists, and manages the user-defined timer tab order in localStorage, with deduplication and automatic addition of any missing timer IDs.
frontend/src/features/timers/pomodoro/Po: React component rendering a Pomodoro timer card with time display, play/pause/reset/skip controls, and editable settings for work and break durations. Uses the usePomodoro hook and notifies users via TimerAlertsProvider on segment completion.
frontend/src/features/timers/pomodoro/us: Custom hook managing Pomodoro timer state including work/break segments, countdown logic via useAccurateInterval, settings persistence in localStorage, and callbacks for segment completion.
frontend/src/features/timers/repeating/R: React component rendering a repeating timer card with time display, play/pause/reset controls, and editable settings for duration, repeat count, and infinite mode. Notifies on all cycles completing via TimerAlertsProvider.
frontend/src/features/timers/repeating/u: Custom hook managing a repeating countdown timer with configurable duration, repeat count, and infinite mode, persisting settings to localStorage and firing an onComplete callback when all cycles finish.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/Anim: SVG component rendering two animated concentric arc rings representing seconds (outer) and minutes (inner) progress, with tick marks and a moving dot indicator.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/Edit: Controlled numeric text input component that allows direct editing, clamps the value to min/max on blur, and syncs with external value changes when not focused.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/Minu: Composite input component that splits a total-seconds value into separate minutes and seconds EditableNumberInput fields, recombining them on change with a minimum of 1 second.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/Rota: A draggable rotary dial React component that maps pointer/touch drag angles to a numeric value within a configurable min/max range, displaying the current value as a counter-rotated label.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/time: Utility functions to format a total-seconds integer into HH:MM:SS or MM:SS strings, and milliseconds into a similar format with centisecond precision.
frontend/src/features/timers/shared/useA: A React hook that runs a callback on a setInterval with the given delay, only while the `running` flag is true, and always calls the latest callback ref.
frontend/src/features/timers/stopwatch/S: Stopwatch UI card component with start/pause, reset, and lap-recording controls, displaying elapsed time and a scrollable lap list using the useStopwatch hook.
frontend/src/features/timers/stopwatch/u: Custom hook managing stopwatch state (elapsed time, running status, laps) with start, pause, reset, and recordLap actions, driven by a 10ms accurate interval.
frontend/src/features/timers/visibility/: A toolbar component showing a live wall-clock, visibility/fullscreen toggles, and a settings dialog with tabs for background, music, alerts, tab order, and sharing.
A fixed top-left clock widget that displays the current time in 12-hour format and hides itself when an active background (image, video, or YouTube) is set.
Hook that persists and manages timer panel visibility and two toggle states in localStorage/sessionStorage, auto-hiding the timer when a background is active unless the user has manually toggled.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to an identity update.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties (colors, radius, etc.) including a settings panel pink/crimson theme, plus fullscreen layout fixes and a subtle pulse keyframe animation.
frontend/src/lib/safeStorage.ts: Utility module wrapping localStorage/sessionStorage with error handling and an in-memory Map fallback, exposing safeGetItem, safeSetItem, and safeRemoveItem functions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with oklch-based CSS variable colors, Quicksand font, custom border radii, a glow box shadow, accordion animations, and the tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, existing features, and a pending fix request (AR-1) to correct the share dialog title displaying 'Settings' instead of 'Share'.
